title: Interactions
description: One literature-backed drug/food/supplement interaction finding for a medication, written by the pharmacy/pharmacist from reputable sources. It reports what the literature says about a pairing and cites sources; it never advises starting, stopping, or changing a medication. Not medical advice.

otherName.description: the interacting drug, food, or supplement, e.g. 'grapefruit'

severity.description: 'minor' | 'moderate' | 'severe' | 'unknown' — the interaction's reported severity, set by the pharmacist

body.description: the finding in markdown with citations; empty while pending

status.description: 'pending' while the pharmacist researches it, 'ready' when done

createdAt.description: when the interaction review was requested
